pages.name: The FM Receiver Crackles, The Pirate Wavelength Carrying A Cool, Seductive Female Voice...

text.content:
This service is unlocked once This Is Nightlight, Signing Off has been completed. It takes place on Sublevel 2 of the Afterlife, and is maintained by Nightlight.

Cost

  • Creating 1 lie which everyone in your upcoming gig believes to be true costs 1 Eagle.

  • Covering up 1 fact which nobody in your upcoming gig will know about costs 1 Eagle.

    • These costs are doubled for lies which are being actively contradicted by other forces at the time of payment.

    • Complicated stories will likely require multiple lies and coverups being pushed simultaneously; these costs can stack up quickly.

Function

Nightlight is the voice of the city, and has half the town in her pocket as a result. She knows where to go, who to talk to, which palms to grease and what favors to call in to turn the truth into whatever is most interesting at the time.

Through a combination of her own stories and her impressive network of reporters, fixers, execs and gang leaders throughout the city, she can temporarily befuddle Night City to the Afterlife's direct benefit.

These lies aren't permanent, though, they expire eventually, as follows:

  • No lie/coverup can last longer than 1 week.

    • For every point of reputation which the highest-rep victim of the lie/coverup has (minor corps & their members have 4; major corps have 6 - all gangs & corp members in the pack have numbers accurate to their status), reduce the effective duration of the lie/coverup by 1 day.

    • All lies/coverups always last a minimum of 24 hours.

    • The truth can be suppressed by refreshing the payment, appending the same amount of time again onto the end of the current period. This can be done any number of times.

These changes can be exposed by a Media passing a DV21 Streetwise/Library Search check, or a DV17 Local Expert/Bureaucracy/Business/Streetwise check for an area/organization relevant to the lie.
